articles.title_en: Russian Navy patents unmanned rescue towing boat
articles.lead_en: The developers specify that the uncrewed boat is designed to deliver the PSN-20 inflatable life raft to the site of an accident in a folded state, tow small surface objects to the site of an accident
articles.title_raw: Russian Navy patents unmanned rescue towing boat
articles.lead_raw: The developers specify that the uncrewed boat is designed to deliver the PSN-20 inflatable life raft to the site of an accident in a folded state, tow small surface objects to the site of an accident

articles.title_en: The Russian Navy patented a rescue unmanned towing boat
articles.lead_en: The vessel is capable of evacuating small surface objects
articles.title_raw: ВМФ России запатентовал спасательный безэкипажный катер-буксировщик
articles.lead_raw: Судно способно выполнить эвакуацию малоразмерных надводных объектов

articles.title_en: Russia’s Defense Ministry says air defenses downed more than 350 drones overnight. Two firefighters killed in Russia.
articles.lead_en: Ukrainian drones struck Russia’s Tambov region, damaging an apartment building, a library, and an arts school in Michurinsk, Tambov Governor Yevgeny Pervyshov said. There were no casualties.
articles.title_raw: Russia’s Defense Ministry says air defenses downed more than 350 drones overnight. Two firefighters killed in Russia.
articles.lead_raw: Ukrainian drones struck Russia’s Tambov region, damaging an apartment building, a library, and an arts school in Michurinsk, Tambov Governor Yevgeny Pervyshov said. There were no casualties.

articles.title_en: IN BRIEF: Ukrainian drone attacks cause casualties in Russia’s Smolensk, Leningrad regions
articles.lead_en: Two emergency workers were killed and another two suffered injuries in a drone strike in the country’s western Smolensk Region
articles.title_raw: IN BRIEF: Ukrainian drone attacks cause casualties in Russia’s Smolensk, Leningrad regions
articles.lead_raw: Two emergency workers were killed and another two suffered injuries in a drone strike in the country’s western Smolensk Region
